articles.title: Trump's theatrical State of the Union address offers little hint of any change in course
articles.summary: The BBC's Anthony Zurcher says the US president appealed to his base and taunted his opponents in a marathon speech.

articles.title: Threat of further violence looms after Mexican cartel rampage
articles.summary: The BBC speaks to Guadalajara residents days after cartel members sought to avenge the killing of Nemesio "El Mencho" Oseguera.

articles.title: Bill Gates 'took responsibility' over Epstein ties in staff meeting, foundation says
articles.summary: A newspaper reports Gates apologised to staff over his links to Epstein and said: "I did nothing illicit. I saw nothing illicit."

articles.title: Japan to deploy missiles on island near Taiwan by 2031
articles.summary: The remote Yonaguni island lies on the frontlines of self-governing Taiwan's growing tensions with China.

articles.title: Zimbabwe rejects 'lopsided' US health aid deal over data concerns
articles.summary: Access to biological samples raised flags for Zimbabwe as the US did not want to share the benefits of its research.

articles.title: Senegal PM proposes tougher anti-LGBT law, doubling prison terms
articles.summary: The bill seeks prison terms of five to ten years for what it describes as "acts against nature".

articles.title: Don't break up NewJeans and I'll forgo $18m payout, says ex-K-pop boss
articles.summary: Min Hee-jin has said she "can no longer bear to watch" the group get "torn apart".

articles.title: Chinese dance group's tour triggers bomb threat against Australian PM
articles.summary: The group was told to cancel its performances or explosives would be set off at Anthony Albanese's house.

articles.title: German chancellor lands in Beijing for inaugural China trip
articles.summary: Friedrich Merz said it would be a mistake to "decouple" Germany from China shortly before boarding a plane to Beijing.

articles.title: Australia police make arrests over alleged murder of grandfather mistakenly kidnapped
articles.summary: Police have said 85-year-old Chris Baghsarian was not the intended target of the alleged crime.
